In [[33 BBY/Legends|33 BBY]], the Science Services [[Chief Scientist/Legends|Chief Scientist]] at [[Corulag Academy]], '''Frexton''', a tall, slender [[Human/Legends|Human]] male, kidnapped the [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] child [[Teela Panjarra]] to study [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] in more depth—using experimental methodologies similar to those that deranged scientist [[Jenna Zan Arbor]] had employed in the past and would continue to employ in the future.<ref name="Adventures" />

In response to the crisis, [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]], [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]], [[Vel Ardox]], [[Noro Zak]], [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]], [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], and [[Adi Gallia/Legends|Adi Gallia]] traveled to [[Corulag/Legends|Corulag]] and its capital city of [[Curamelle/Legends|Curamelle]] that they might rescue the girl from such unethical and perverse mistreatment. Their efforts were hampered by an attack by [[Bartokk]] [[Assassin/Legends|assassins]] and a group of [[X10-D]] droids. Eventually, however, the [[Assassin/Legends|assassins]] were slain and the child was rescued from the Academy's nursery and taken to the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].<ref name="Adventures" />
